name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit operates through specialized sub-brands (Profusion for data analytics, Amplify Analytix for CX intelligence) targeting financial services with AI-driven customer analytics. Their methodology centers on data science and predictive modeling rather than traditional survey-based XM. Delivery is primarily through managed analytics services and consulting engagements in the EU and India markets. They position GenAI as a core differentiator for extracting behavioral insights from unstructured customer data, operating entirely outside the Qualtrics/Medallia platform ecosystem.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta positions as the premier SAP-Qualtrics integration specialist in DACH, with a methodology that embeds experience data directly into operational SAP workflows. Their AI approach leverages both SAP Business AI and Qualtrics AI capabilities to create closed-loop experience management within enterprise ERP environments. Delivery model combines product development (custom SAP Fiori/BTP apps) with strategic consulting. Thought leadership themes center on democratizing experience data for frontline workers through intuitive UX design embedded in existing SAP interfaces, with increasing emphasis on AI agents for automated experience orchestration.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is the dominant Qualtrics partner in the GCC, specializing in large-scale government CX transformation programs aligned with national vision strategies (Saudi Vision 2030, UAE Centennial 2071). Their methodology combines Western XM best practices with deep cultural localization for Arabic-speaking markets. Delivery model centers on long-term government advisory engagements with embedded Qualtrics platform implementation. AI positioning focuses on Arabic NLP for sentiment analysis and predictive citizen experience modeling, with thought leadership emphasizing CX maturity frameworks for public sector organizations.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX operates as a research-first CX consultancy leveraging proprietary methodologies (Forces of CX, Ipsos Loyalty) and global panel infrastructure. Their AI approach emphasizes predictive analytics and advanced statistical modeling over platform-native AI capabilities, maintaining independence from any single XM vendor. Delivery model combines syndicated research with bespoke enterprise CX programs, often in partnership with Medallia for technology implementation. Thought leadership focuses on macro CX trends, industry benchmarking, and ROI measurement frameworks that appeal to C-suite audiences in banking, retail, and telecommunications.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in complex enterprise XM deployments, with particular strength in banking and financial services. Their methodology follows a data-driven, technical implementation approach that emphasizes platform optimization, integration architecture, and advanced analytics configuration. AI stance is closely aligned with Qualtrics-native AI capabilities, positioning themselves as expert implementers of Qualtrics AI features including Text iQ, Predict iQ, and the newly announced AI agents. Delivery model combines strategic advisory with deep technical Qualtrics platform expertise, targeting mid-market to enterprise accounts in the US.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner focused on enterprise experience management across the UK and EU. Their methodology emphasizes strategic CX consulting combined with Qualtrics platform implementation, with historical strength in employee experience and customer journey mapping. Their prolonged low activity in Q1 2026 around the X4 conference cycle represents a departure from expected partner engagement patterns, potentially indicating business model evolution, resource constraints, or strategic repositioning within the Qualtrics ecosystem.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap operates as a platform-agnostic CX and EX consulting firm with deep expertise in customer journey mapping, employee experience transformation, and organizational change management. Their methodology is human-centered and research-driven, emphasizing qualitative journey research over technology-first approaches. AI positioning is pragmatic and advisory rather than platform-specific, focusing on helping enterprises understand where AI can enhance human experiences. Delivery model is pure consulting with multi-market Spanish-language content reinforcing their dominance in the Iberian and Latin American CX advisory space.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is a Qualtrics-certified CX consultancy with the broadest geographic coverage in the Spanish-speaking world, operating across 15+ countries in Iberoamerica. Their methodology combines VOC program design with CX strategy consulting, leveraging Qualtrics as their primary technology platform. AI approach focuses on Qualtrics-native analytics and text analytics capabilities applied to Spanish-language customer feedback. Delivery model emphasizes regional scalability with centralized methodology, positioning them as the go-to Qualtrics implementation partner for enterprises seeking pan-Latin American CX programs. Thought leadership themes center on CX maturity, digital transformation, and customer-centric culture change.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant approaches CX from an engineering-first perspective through its Connected Experiences Studio, emphasizing custom digital product development over packaged XM platform implementations. Their AI approach is enterprise-grade, focusing on building custom AI solutions, integrating generative AI into customer-facing applications, and creating proprietary digital experiences rather than configuring third-party platforms. Delivery model is large-scale software engineering with global delivery centers, targeting enterprise transformation budgets rather than XM program budgets. This makes them a formidable competitor in banking and retail digital transformation deals where CX is a component of broader technology modernization initiatives.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Vocé Group remains untrackable through standard competitive intelligence methods. May operate through personal networks, word-of-mouth referrals, or under a different business entity name not yet identified in our tracking.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Zill Consulting remains untrackable through standard competitive intelligence methods. May operate as a sole practitioner or boutique advisory firm relying on personal referral networks rather than digital marketing.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Act XM remains untrackable through standard competitive intelligence methods. May operate under a different business name, as a division of another entity, or through private consulting engagements not visible in public digital channels.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program design and implementation with notable reference clients across technology (CrowdStrike), aviation (WestJet), and gaming (OLG). Their methodology emphasizes strategic roadmapping and phased XM maturity progression, combining Qualtrics platform expertise with change management and adoption consulting. AI approach is tightly aligned with Qualtrics-native capabilities, positioning as expert advisors on leveraging AI agents, predictive analytics, and automated experience orchestration within the Qualtrics ecosystem. Post-X4 content focus suggests strong alignment with Qualtrics' latest product direction and active pipeline generation in enterprise accounts.
